specific_mechanism: FRENET-GATE: per-token TNB frame + curvature κ + torsion τ + κ-gated attention
llm_application: At each token position, compute three orthonormal direction vectors from consecutive hidden states (analogous to local curve frame); estimate a local curvature magnitude and a local torsion magnitude; gate the attention bandwidth by the curvature magnitude — high curvature widens the context window for that token.
novelty_claim: Gating Enables Curvature analyses Fisher-Rao manifold curvature; this candidate uses EUCLIDEAN curve curvature κ as gating signal.
